title: Crisis Archive
subtitle: Learn from history and build a crisis-recognition framework.

crises.title: Dot-com Bubble
crises.lesson: Valuation detached from revenue, "eyeball economy" model. Nasdaq PE reached 200x, P/S 4.5x. Cisco PE 472x.
crises.compare: Today's AI has real revenue, but Nasdaq 100 P/S has reached 6.5x, surpassing 2000's 4.5x.

crises.title: Subprime Crisis
crises.lesson: Complex derivatives masked risk; ratings failed. MBS/CDO chains broke; interbank liquidity dried up.
crises.compare: China's local government debt lacks transparency; LGFV spreads at 285bp approach the red line; bank NIM hits new lows.

crises.title: A-share Crash
crises.lesson: Margin financing, trading halts, liquidity freeze. Margin balance peaked at 2.2tn then crashed.
crises.compare: Current margin balance 1.52tn, below 2015 peak, but PB<1 stocks at 8.5% near low signal.

crises.title: COVID Crash
crises.lesson: Black swan event, liquidity crisis. US stocks circuit-broke 4 times in 10 days; global central banks cut rates + QE.
crises.compare: Policy room has narrowed; global government debt/GDP at 94.7%; VIX in normal range.

crises.title: Evergrande Crisis
crises.lesson: High-turnover model ended; debt chain transmitted. 2tn debt default triggered industry chain reaction.
crises.compare: Country Garden + Vanke + Sunac simultaneously in crisis; 100-city second-hand prices -8.55%; deleveraging ongoing.

crises.title: UK Pension Crisis
crises.lesson: LDI strategy vulnerability under rate volatility. Yield surge triggered margin call negative feedback.
crises.compare: After China wealth management products moved to NAV pricing, rate volatility may trigger similar negative feedback.
